messages.text: flow vibes i dont need permission
you stay pressed but never exit stage left
you are talking, not landing it
you side eye me in full paragraphs
you got jokes, now show it
your resistance game is cute, i’ll allow it
you’re mad focused for someone “over it”
you swear it’s casual with curated precision
you really thought that would work
